transitions are monotonic per SDD \u00a78.3 (INV_CertificateMonotonic):      `Valid \u2192 Expired | Revoked`, both terminal. Calling `revokeCertificate`      on a token that has already expired is rejected \u2014 the certificate is      already in a terminal state.      Role checks delegate to HemaRegistry (single source of truth) \u2014 no      AccessControl roles are stored locally.","errors":{"ERC721IncorrectOwner(address,uint256,address)":[{"details":"Indicates an error related to the ownership over a particular token. params.expiresAt: absolute expiry timestamp (must be in the future).
params.ipfsCID: IPFS content identifier where the PDF lives.
params.subject: the institution being certified.

issueCertificate(address,uint8,uint256,b.notice: Mint a new certificate NFT to `subject`.

metadataOf(uint256).notice: Returns the full on-chain metadata for a token.

revokeCertificate(uint256,string).notice: Revoke a certificate. Only valid while the token is `Valid` —         once expired, status is already terminal (INV_CertificateMonotonic).

statusOf(uint256).notice: Current monotonic status of a certificate.
